codeReview.summary: The fix now drives the StreamableHTTP production path through handler.ServeHTTP with real JSON-RPC requests and checks provenance for both external and supervisor traffic. Session-isolation, broadcast propagation, and no-self-wake behavior are still covered on the live route, so the VAL-SUPERVISOR-003 proof gap is closed.

summary: PASS: the new regression exercises the actual production StreamableHTTP route and preserves the earlier isolation/broadcast behavior.
